title: nicoteba nilgherrensis
intro: Nicoteba nilgherrensis, also known as Nilgiri Madder or Nilgiri Madder Root, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The root of the plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its medicinal properties. Herbal preparations of Nicoteba nilgherrensis include decoctions, infusions, and powder forms, which can be used to treat a range of health benefits, including wound healing, skin issues, and digestive problems.
